steps: Put Milonig's phosphate buffer in a becker undetermined https://www.protocols.io/view/0-1-M-Millonig-s-phosphate-buffer-pH-7-2-e3vbgn6 Millonigs Phosphate Buffer VWR International (Avantor) Catalog #100496
Add Tannic Acid to the becker with the previous solution Tannic acid Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #403040
Add 6 mL of Glutarandehyde to the previous solution undetermined Glutaraldehyde EM Grade 25% Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #G5882-50ML
creator: Diogo B. Provete
